Description: Users report 10+ second load times on iOS and Android devices. Need performance optimization audit.

Web app doesn't render correctly on mobile. Market analysis shows 60% of usage is mobile. Native app could increase engagement 3x.

Customers want real-time Slack notifications for updates. Would increase user engagement.
Analytics dashboard shows 15-20% variance from source data. Root cause unknown. Blocking enterprise deals.
Enterprise customers need ability to create custom reports. Currently limited to pre-built templates.
50+ customers requesting support for currencies other than USD. Limiting international expansion.
